lines.speaker: Aleck
lines.text: Hello, hello, and a most warm welcome to my Hunter Emporium. We have everything the discerning Hunter could need.

lines.speaker: Aleck
lines.text: Would you like me to show you our range of equipment? Or was there something specific you were after?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, let's see what you've got!

lines.speaker: Aleck
lines.text: Well, if you do ever find yourself in need of the finest Hunter equipment available, then you know where to come.

lines.speaker: Aleck
lines.text: Him? I think he might be crazy. Either that or he's seeking attention.

lines.speaker: Aleck
lines.text: He keeps trying to sell me these barmy looking weapons he's invented. I can't see them working, personally.
